description_long: This is a large, detached suburban house set on a landscaped lot with a driveway, garage, and surrounding trees. The house features a prominent front porch with columns, a gabled roof, and multiple windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a two-car garage, and a blue car is parked outside. The backyard is enclosed by a row of trees, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, with some greenery and palm trees accenting the front yard. The overall design is spacious, with clear separation between the house, garage, and outdoor areas.
description: A spacious suburban house with a gabled roof, front porch, and attached garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees. The property features a driveway, multiple windows, and a private backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch with columns, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the row of trees enclosing the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, tree enclosure, and the back facade of the house with patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, blue car, and additional landscaping along the side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, and supporting columns
